name: Ordissimo SA
summary: Ordissimo SA provides computers and smartphones in France, Germany, Belgium, and Switzerland. It also offers printers; and accessories, such as hard drives, mouse products, protective covers for smartphones, and screen cleaners for PC and smartphone. The company sells its products through own retail outlets and approximately 250 retailers, as well as online. Ordissimo SA was founded in 2002 and is based in Montrouge, France.
